title: Reading and Use of English - Part 5
description: Read the text and choose the correct answer (A, B, C or D) for each question.

content.text: Scientists have long been fascinated by the behaviour of dolphins. These marine mammals display remarkable intelligence and social complexity...||Recent studies have shown that dolphins can recognize themselves in mirrors, a trait previously thought to be unique to humans and great apes. This (1) ...... of self-awareness suggests a level of consciousness that continues to surprise researchers...

questions.question: What does the writer suggest about dolphins in the first paragraph?
options: A) They are the most intelligent marine animals
B) They show complex social behaviours
C) They cannot recognize themselves in mirrors
D) They are similar to fish in their behaviour
questions.explanation: The text states 'dolphins display remarkable intelligence and social complexity'.

questions.question: What does 'this' in line 5 refer to?
questions.explanation: 'This' refers to the ability to recognize themselves in mirrors mentioned in the previous sentence.
